case_title: SOUTH COUNTY BANK, N.A. VS. FIRST-CITIZENS BANK & TRUST COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION, 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, PLAINTIFF SOUTH COUNTY BANK, N.A.'S MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION IS DENIED. EVEN ASSUMING THE COURT COULD ENJOIN THE ALLEGED BREACH OF CONTRACT, PLAINTIFF HAS NOT SHOWN IT IS LIKELY TO PREVAIL ON THE MERITS GIVEN A REASONABLE INTERPRETATION OF ITS RIGHTS UNDER THE PARTICIPATION AGREEMENT, AND PLAINTIFF HAS NOT SHOWN IRREPARABLE INJURY WILL OCCUR GIVEN THAT ANY INJURY WOULD BE COMPENSABLE IN DAMAGES. JUDGE PETER J. BUSCH, CLERK K. LIU, NOT REPORTED. ORDER SIGNED N OPEN COURT. JUDGE PETER J. BUSCH, CLERK K. LIU, NOT REPORTED.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT FIRST-CITIZENS BANK & TRUST COMPANY

Off Calendar Oct-15-2014 Text Ruling

Daniel Rockey, Esq. of Bryan Cave, (415-268-1986) for Pacific Coast Bankers Bancshares, Defendant and moving party.
Arthur Jarvis Cohen, Esq., Attorney at Law, (949-766-3075), for South County Bank, N.A., Plaintiff and opposing party.

ARGUED. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral arguments rules as follows: DEFENDANT PACIFIC COAST BANKERS BANCSHARES' MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES is TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. Moving party is ordered to prepare proposed order leaving the amount for attorney fees and expenses blank. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.

Daniel Rockey, Esq. of Bryan Cave, (415-268-1986), for Pacific Coast Bankers' Bancshares, Defendant and moving party.
Arthur Cohen, Esq., Attorney at Law, (949-766-3075), APPEARING THROUGH COURT CALL, for South County Bank, Plaintiff and opposing party.

ARGUED. Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT PACIFIC COAST BANKERS' BANCSHARES DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. Plaintiff failed to allege any actionable breach of contract by the moving defendant. See ex. 1 to Second Amended Complaint Paragraph 11 and 18. Prevailing party to prepare order approved as to form. Off Calendar Aug-28-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Atty. Daniel Rockey (415-268-1999) appearing for Defendant and moving party/ Atty. Arthur Cohen (949-766-3075) appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party by Court Call.

Argued. - Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows: Defendant's Demurrer to First Amended Complaint is sustained without leave to amend as to first and third causes of action. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend to allege in good faith facts giving rise to an actionable breach of contract. Order for the same signed in open court as modified. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Susan Crozier CSR 4761.

Mtn For Prelim Injunction
Off Calendar May-22-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Atty Arthur Jarvis Cohen of Attorney at Law (949-766-3075) appear for plaintiff South County Bank, N.A. moving party.
Atty. Daniel Rockey of Bryan Cave (415-268-1988) appear for defendant Pacific Coast Bankers opposing party.
Atty. Martin D. Dioli of terra Law LLP (408-299-1200) appear for defendant First-Citizens Bank & Trust opposing party.

Argued, the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF SOUTH COUNTY BANK, N.A.'s Motion For Preliminary Injunction is DENIED. Even assuming the Court could enjoin the alleged breach of contract, Plaintiff has not shown it is likely to prevail on the merits given a reasonable interpretation of its rights under the participation agreement, and Plaintiff has not shown irreparable injury will occur given that any injury would be compensable in damages. Judge Peter J. Busch, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. Order signed n open court. Judge Peter J. Busch, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D501)
